titleStmt.title: SII 8.248: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 248. (A.R. No. 643 of 1902). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarāja tevaṟku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu ḷ 10 70- ṉāl Irācentira
coḻavaḷanāṭṭup puṟaṅkarampaināṭṭu brahma teyam śrīkulottuṅkacoḻaccatu- rvvedi maṅkalattup peruṅkuṟippe
rumakkaḷ Eḻuttu Innāṭṭu neṉmalināṭṭut tirukkaḷaril Uṭaiyār muḷaittanāyaṉār koyilil tāṉattār ka
ṇṭu Iṉṉāyaṉār koyilil Āśra yamāka nākaṅkuṭaiyār maṇṭaiyāḻvār Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Uṭaiyār tiruvāla
vāyuṭaiyār Ulakuṭaiyaperumāḷ tirumeṉi kalyā ṇatirumeṉiyākavum grā mamadhyasupratiṣṭhi tamāka pūjaikoṇṭaru
ḷavum Innāyaṉāṟku pūjaikkum tiruvamutupaṭikkum Uṭalāka periyatevaṟku muppattoṉpatāvatu Ūrkkaṇakku karuṇā
karapiriyaṉ Aṉupokam Eḻuta sabhā viṉiyokattuk kuṭalāka Ivaṉ kāṭṭiṉa nellāl maṭakkile Ivvūrp piṭākai
tirucciṟṟampalanallūril kāvaṉūrkiḻavaṉ Āṭkoṇṭāṉ muḷaittāṉpakkal Innāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi
yāka vilaikoṇṭa piramāṇappaṭi sarasva tivatikku kiḻakku rājādhi rājavāykkālukku teṟkku 5- kaṇṇāṟṟuThis word is expressed by the symbol 9.1- catirat tuṇṭattu
kaṇṭeṟu Uṭpaṭa nilam �ta Itil teṉkiḻakkaṭaiya kuḷamum karaiyum nilaṅkalantavāṟṟāl nīrnilai cempā
ti Uṭpaṭa nilam ma nikki nilam3 10 4 na-m 6- kaṇṇāṟṟuThis word is expressed by the symbol 9.1- catirattu vaṭameṟkaṭaiya nilam pa Itil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam �kikiḻakku I sa m Āka nilam
nālumā Araikkāṇi muntirikai kiḻaraiye Iraṇṭumāviṉāl tarappaṭi maṭakku nilam[�] Immaṭakku nilam Araikkā
ṇiyum Ivvāṇṭu pacāṉamutal Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku candrāditya varaiyum Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭuttom Immaṭakkunilam A
raikkāṇiyum Inniyokappaṭiye kalveṭṭikkoḷḷappaṇṇuka veṉṟu Eḻuti Ūrkkaṇakku karuṇāka
rapri yaṉum peruṅkuṟipperumakkaḷum Eḻuttiṭṭatu .
Digital edition of SII 8.248 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
